document.title: MI97-05149A ASSY COVER-DETECTOR_CHARGER_TERMINAL 승인원
document.documentType: Supplier part approval package with approval sheet, E-BOM, control plan, inspection sheet, work instruction, outgoing inspection sheet, packing specification, and recycling self-declaration

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and supplier quality documentation for Samsung part MI97-05149A, ASSY COVER-DETECTOR_CHARGER_TERMINAL, supplied by Daeil Precision.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design output and supplier approval evidence for a detector charger terminal cover assembly, including BOM, process controls, inspection criteria, work instruction, packing, and material restrictions.
keyPoints: Material code and SEC part number are MI97-05149A for ASSY COVER-DETECTOR_CHARGER_TERMINAL.
Vendor, manufacturer, or supplier is identified as 대일정공 / DAEIL PRECISION / DXPG.
Control Plan Category marks SOP and lists receiving inspection, material storage, assembly, outgoing inspection, and packing controls.
Inspection criteria require no harmful foreign matter, peeling, or cracking, and require two TAPE PET-PROTECT_COVER_CHARGER_TERMINAL attachments without missing attachment.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal indicates FDA, but FDA is not present in the source text; authority or jurisdiction is therefore ambiguous.
Multiple dates appear in the source: E.D DATE 2020-07-19, EC history 21.07.19, control plan 2021.07.20, work instruction 21.08.10, and packing specification 21-7-19.
Some spreadsheet cells show extraction artifacts such as #REF!, many empty comma-delimited cells, and inconsistent spacing.
